title: lyonia ligustrina
intro: Lyonia ligustrina, also known as the fetid or stinkwood, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lyonia ligustrina include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Lyonia ligustrina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other illnesses.
